scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=sentinelops-frontend" "cd sentinelops-backend && python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.dev:docker: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=sentinelops-frontend" "cd sentinelops-backend && docker compose up"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd sentinelops-frontend && npm install && cd ../sentinelops-backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
